channel.title: DCS on BurningXFlame
channel.description: Recent content in DCS on BurningXFlame

item.title: Intro
item.description: DCS - Horizontally-Scalable Cron for Cloud DCS is a Truly-Distributed, Load-Balanced and Horizontally-Scalable Job Scheduling System for Cloud-Native environments.

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Features, Pricing and Licensing Category Feature Pro Enterprise Audience Small Business Medium to Large Companies API CR ✅ ✅ API RESTful ✅ ✅ Function Cron Job ✅ ✅ Function Periodic Job ✅ ✅ Function HTTP Callback ✅ ✅ Function HTTP Callback with Header and/or Body ✅ ✅ Function TCP Callback ✅ ✅ Function Time Zone ✅ ✅ Function Time Zone Change - ✅ Function Job History - ✅ Function Limit Schedule Times - ✅ Scalability Vertical Scaling ✅ ✅ Scalability Horizontal Scaling - ✅ Reliability Architecture Active-Standby Truly-Distributed, Load-Balancing Reliability Callback with Retry - ✅ Reliability Callback with Timeout - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime During Scaling Out/In - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime During Upgrade - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Time Zone Changes - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Temporary Errors - ✅ Reliability Zero Downtime on Process Crash - ✅ Logging High-Performant Logging and Log Rotation ✅ ✅ Deployment Zero Dependency ✅ ✅ Deployment Docker Image and Helm Chart ✅ ✅ Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade to a New Version ✅ ✅ Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade from Pro - ✅ Support Email Email License Commercial Commercial Learn More → Learn More → Buy ↗ Buy ↗ With the purchase of a commercial license:

item.title: Pro
item.description: Complete List of All Features Buy Features of DCS Pro Function Define a Job apiVersion: ext.burningxflame.github.com/v1 kind: CronJob metadata: namespace: <ns> name: <name> spec: expr: .

item.title: Enterprise
item.description: Complete List of All Features Buy Features of DCS Enterprise Besides features of DCS Pro → , DCS Enterprise provides the following features.

item.title: RESTful
item.description: Create/Update a Job Request Method: PUT URL: https://<host:port>/jobs/<namespace>/<name> Header: Content-Type: application/json Body: As follows are all fields including optional ones.
